audit_notes: Audited 1 table leaf (display-resolution table, 11 rows × 2 cols = 22 cells). Headers '画素数の表記/呼び名' → '像素数表示/名称' & 'Pixel Count Notation/Name' — clean. Resolution values (numerics) identical across all 3 langs. Acronyms VGA/SVGA/XGA/QVGA/SXGA/FWXGA/UXGA/4K/8K preserved. FHD expanded to '全高清（FHD）'/'FHD (Full HD)' — helpful expansion. Note: source labels 1280×960 as 'QVGA' which is factually unusual (standard QVGA=320×240), but this is a JP source-content question, not a translation defect — translations faithfully mirror source. No choice markers.
